what makes this team composition so strong?
arithmetica harmony is capped at +1 cost in train meaning you can loop gmurphy abyss hymn for net arith gain and go draw positive even through arithmetic's harmony
resulting in effectively infinite resource gain via looping replays and searches (at least until the deck shuffle limit comes into play)

the ability to cycle your entire deck twice and play every single card of value in it 2-4 times a turn plus infinite meter and buffs means you can clear fights in low turncount which then means high leaderboard ranking
ryker is there for the huge damage scaling via the natural sigil gain off blessed jade relic and vortice is there solely for fortress removal to 1turn bosses
I mean we're going to use those normal pulls on that banner anyways, so why not aim for them? Or is there another use of normal pulls?

how does realm mastery work with dultra again?

You get 5% (10% if pure) more Prism and Beacon stacks per 100 RM

Ultimately, it's all about Prism stack breakpoints, which are something like that
counterpoint, spooky is not smart
I have 199 instead of 201 #cooked #morimathroundsup
What the hell does these mean
note that those numbers are for pure realm, not mixed
double the values for each if mixed
also for ~~prism~~ beacon you need to add an additional baseline of 1 to increase the threshold past an exact integer so it ceilings to the next one
i.e., 40 RM = does nothing, 41 RM = +1, 80 RM = same as 41, 81 RM = +1 over 41

can someone help explain to me how ultra hybrid teams work with chaos or aequor characters? as a newer player, those are the main factions i’ve been working on and i’ve avoided ultra entirely bc i don’t really understand how to make it good, but i’m seeing all the top teams in the skybound rail event using at least 2 ultra characters.
Caecus E3 sustain is a trap…
this is what i’m working with
everywhere I looked said that it was op or something <:please:1356053110375714817>
same lol

first card played gets added to ultra bar, if the card has a leap or quasar (the cards that glow yellow at turn start) will proc an extra effect when entering ultra bar
can click the shinny purple button to the left of the ultra bar to burn the leftmost card in the ultra bar for an insight
when purple bar full you get an extra turn, outside of mono ultra you do get a damage penalty inside the extra turn

also worth noting the main reason ultra is high on HSR isn’t mainly because the realm is really OP there, but rather specifically Pollux has a passive that makes him stronger the more fights he participates in which can become rather ridiculous in HSR
